pageContext.name: Chani
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics are excited to present the Chani Figure from the award-winning film, Dune!  Chani is a Fremen, a desert-warrior on the planet Arrakis. When her destiny becomes intertwined with a mysterious off-worlder named Paul Atreides, the fight for her people becomes the fight of her life.  Don't miss your chance to add this Chani Figure to your collection today!
